name: ddd-expert
description: EventStorming-led DDD workflow for strategic modeling, tactical design, implementation, and review

interface.longDescription: EventStorming-led DDD workflow from backend product evidence through accepted Strategic Modeling and Tactical Design to a codify-ready handoff, with independent implementation review.
defaultPrompt: Use $ddd-expert:event-storming to take this backend story through proportionate EventStorming to accepted Strategic Modeling and a codify-ready Tactical Design.
